AI in Education & Learning.title: Trump Signs AI Executive Order as States Implement AI Laws
AI in Education & Learning.description: In December 2025, President Trump issued an executive order establishing a national artificial intelligence (AI) policy framework, challenging stricter state AI laws, and tying certain federal funding to state compliance.

AI in Education & Learning.description: Graphical reasoning in rotational kinematics remains a persistent challenge for secondary students, largely due to difficulties in interpreting and connecting angular displacement, velocity, and acceleration graphs. AI in Education & Learning.description:

AI in Education & Learning.title: Investigating student perceptions of creativity and generative ai in computational physics
AI in Education & Learning.description: Generative Artificial Intelligence (gen-AI) is rapidly becoming more integrated into today's classrooms in all ranges of education. Future of Work & Skills.title: Atlassian follows Block’s footsteps and cuts staff in the name of AI
Future of Work & Skills.description: Atlassian laid off 10% of its workforce, around 1,600 people, as the company looks to funnel more funds to AI.

Future of Work & Skills.title: Gumloop lands $50M from Benchmark to turn every employee into an AI agent builder
Future of Work & Skills.description: As companies race to adopt AI, Benchmark general partner Everett Randle believes the key to success lies in empowering every worker with AI superpowers, and Gumloop’s intuitive agent builder is an example of the kind of tool that will unlock that potential.
